/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/AVL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/BST.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/Heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/GUIManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/PriorityQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/RedBlack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Data_Structures_Final.dir/src/StackQueue.cpp.o -o Data_Structures_Final  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.5.1
